title: Legal + Integrity
objective: Add the MIT license, fix broken references, remove orphan files, and fix bugs in `init-docs.sh`.
description: Critical pre-publication blockers: without a license the repo is not adoptable. Broken workflow and migration references damage credibility. An orphan template file exists. `init-docs.sh` does not copy `TESTING_GUIDE_FOR_AI.md.template` and uses a macOS-only date flag.
must: Create a MIT license with the correct year and author
Remove broken workflow and migration references from the docs
Remove the orphan slice template file
Rename the slice PR template and update init-docs.sh
Add a copy step for TESTING_GUIDE_FOR_AI.md.template in init-docs.sh
Replace the macOS-only date flag with a portable Node-based equivalent in init-docs.sh
not_included: CONTRIBUTING, CoC, SECURITY — van en slice-05
Traducción a inglés — va en slice-03
acceptance: LICENSE existe en raíz con texto MIT válido
init-docs.sh corre en macOS y Linux sin diferencia en placeholder de fechas
No file in the repo references the broken workflow or migration docs
specs/[project-name]/slices/ contiene solo slice-template/ (carpeta) y pr.md.template
assumptions: El autor/copyright del LICENSE es FabriJuncal / Fabri Juncal
Node está disponible en el entorno de ejecución de init-docs.sh
